untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition (cup formation geometry, handle retrace measurement, rim identification, dimension classification). The allowed indicators do not include pattern-specific tools for identifying cup shapes, measuring cup depth/width, handle retrace percentages relative to cup structure, or classifying dimensions. Pattern dimensions (short/tall, narrow/wide) and handle retrace characteristics cannot be expressed as simple price/indicator comparisons. The performance data provided (dimension-based returns: -16% to -32%) describes expected outcomes but does not provide actionable entry/exit thresholds.
translation_notes: This is a geometric/morphological pattern requiring candlestick pattern recognition library. Consider: (1) implementing a dedicated Cup and Handle detector, (2) using pivot-based breakout as proxy entry, (3) defining handle retrace as pullback toward s1 level, (4) setting stop below cup lows. Source text contains incomplete performance data ('Tall' entry cut off). The signal specifies performance varies by market condition and rim alignment but provides only negative return ranges (-16% to -32%), suggesting these may be failure rates or market-regime-specific outcomes rather than general expectations.
